title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Mapei India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Mapei India
jsonLd.description:
We at Mapei India are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Rajkot. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Mapei India:
Mapei India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mapei India!
